records.ety: [L. architectus, architecton, Gr. <?/ chief artificer, master builder; pref. 'archi- (E. archi-) + <?/ workman, akin to <?/ art, skill, <?/ to produce: cf. F. architecte, It. architetto. See Technical.]

defs: A person skilled in the art of building; one who understands architecture, or makes it his occupation to form plans and designs of buildings, and to superintend the artificers employed.

quotes: The architects of their own happiness.
A French woman is a perfect architect in dress.
